dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Speaks in controlled terms that leave room for maneuver while still sounding decisive. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Sorra Waycord is a deputy master anchored to Nomdara Council of Elders, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Sorra Waycord is a deputy master anchored to Nomdara Council of Elders, where daily institutional pressures make them us

setting_placement.location_setting: Elder council coordinating mobile Nomdara judgment, long-memory diplomacy, and caravan priorities.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of Nomdara Council of Elders
who_depends_on_them: Jalen Waycord (Both tied to Nomdara Council of Elders.)

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master. Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Sorra Waycord carries civic or noble weight.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Sorra Waycord presents as Speaks in controlled terms that leave room for maneuver while still sounding decisive. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Sorra Waycord carries civic or noble weight.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Nomdara Council of Elders workable through the obligations of deputy master while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan. Must keep status, precedent, and practical necessity from openly tearing against one another. Around Nomdara Council of Elders, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of deputy master visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must keep status, precedent, and practical necessity from openly tearing against one another. Around Nomdara Council of Elders, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of deputy master visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Deputy Master, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Nomdara Council of Elders workable through the obligations of deputy master while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for extra hands on a burdened local problem, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Sorra Waycord can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Deputy Master too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.magic: Not explicitly stated unless separately asserted elsewhere in corpus.
capabilities.combat: Role-dependent; implied only to the degree their office already carries enforcement, survival, or defensive expectation.
capabilities.social: Speaks in controlled terms that leave room for maneuver while still sounding decisive. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of deputy master in and around Nomdara Council of Elders, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
capabilities.logistical_economic: Keep Nomdara Council of Elders workable through the obligations of deputy master while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
capabilities.investigative_covert: Must keep status, precedent, and practical necessity from openly tearing against one another. Around Nomdara Council of Elders, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of deputy master visibly slip.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Sorra Waycord adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Nomdara Council of Elders learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Sorra Waycord or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Sorra Waycord as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Nomdara Council of Elders: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Sorra Waycord can propagate upward through Nomdara Caravan if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

relationships.note: Both tied to Nomdara Council of Elders.

hooks.summary: Sorra Waycord needs discreet outside help to contain political strain, prestige loss, or institutional damage before it spreads through Nomdara Council of Elders.
Getting entangled with Sorra Waycord can pull the party into protocol, alliance pressure, or public consequence centered on Nomdara Council of Elders.
Sorra Waycord can trade usable insight about Nomdara Council of Elders if the party solves a problem that cannot be addressed openly through the office they hold.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara Council of Elders: estates, audience spaces, council rooms, protocol-heavy gatherings, or civic seats

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Deputy Master.
rumor: People say Sorra Waycord is Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
